prompt_meta.strategy: CRT + TBS (Candle Range Theory + Time-Based Strategy)
prompt_meta.author_note: Build a fully autonomous, scalping-focused MT5 EA integrating CRT pattern detection with TBS kill-zone timing, multi-timeframe confluence, live account diagnostics, and on-chart candlestick annotations. All components described below must be implemented.

strategy_definition.overview: CRT+TBS is a Smart Money / ICT-derived scalping methodology. CRT (Candle Range Theory) identifies market structure through the AMD cycle on candle data. TBS (Time-Based Strategy) filters trades to high-probability time windows called kill zones. The combination ensures the EA only acts when BOTH pattern confluence and session timing align.

CRT.core_concept: Every candle (or candle range) goes through three phases: Accumulation, Manipulation, and Distribution (AMD). The EA must detect each phase and classify every significant candle or candle group accordingly.

Accumulation.description: Price consolidates in a defined range. Candle bodies are small relative to range. Volume is compressed. Defines the 'dealing range' for subsequent phases.

Manipulation.description: Price sweeps beyond the accumulation high or low, hunting stop losses. This is a false breakout. Candle wick extends beyond range, but body closes back inside or near range. This is the PRIMARY entry signal.

Distribution.description: Price moves decisively in the true direction after manipulation. Candle bodies are large, closes are near extremes. This is the target zone.

fair_value_gap.description: FVG is a 3-candle pattern where candle 3 does not overlap with candle 1, leaving an imbalance. These zones act as magnets for price.

premium_discount_zones.description: Split the AMD range at 50% (equilibrium). Above 50% = premium (sell zone). Below 50% = discount (buy zone).

candle_body_wick_ratio.description: Used to classify candle type for pattern recognition.

structural_levels.swing_high: Local high with at least 2 lower highs on each side
structural_levels.swing_low: Local low with at least 2 higher lows on each side
structural_levels.break_of_structure: Price closes beyond swing high/low on body close
structural_levels.change_of_character: First BOS in opposite direction after trend

order_blocks.description: Last bearish candle before a bullish impulse (bullish OB) or last bullish candle before a bearish impulse (bearish OB). High-probability reversal zones.

inducement_levels.description: Minor swing highs/lows that price sweeps before the true move. CRT calls these 'inducements'. EA must detect and mark them.
inducement_levels.label: IDM

TBS.core_concept: Trade only during defined kill zones when institutional order flow is highest. All times in broker server time. EA must auto-detect broker timezone offset relative to UTC.

asian_session.name: Asian Kill Zone
asian_session.gold_relevance: Low volatility, use only for range accumulation detection

london_open.name: London Kill Zone
london_open.gold_relevance: High — primary CRT manipulation events happen here

new_york_open.name: New York Kill Zone
new_york_open.gold_relevance: Highest — strongest XAUUSD momentum and volume

midnight_open.description: 00:00 UTC open price. Critical CRT reference for daily AMD range.

ny_open_price.description: 07:00 UTC open price. Highest significance for XAUUSD.

ea_configuration.description: CRT + TBS scalper for XAUUSD. Detects AMD cycle, FVGs, order blocks, and inducements. Trades only within kill zones. Fully annotated chart with dashboard.

InpHTF_Timeframe.description: Higher timeframe for HTF bias and AMD structure

InpManipulation_MinWickPips.description: Minimum wick penetration (in pips) to confirm manipulation sweep

InpFVG_MinGapPips.description: Minimum fair value gap size in pips to qualify as tradeable FVG

InpConsolidation_Candles.description: Minimum candles to confirm accumulation phase

InpBiasConfirmation.description: Require HTF bias confirmation before LTF entry

InpOB_Enabled.description: Enable Order Block detection and zone drawing

InpBrokerUTC_Offset.description: Broker server UTC offset in hours. Auto-detected if set to 999.

InpAutoDetect_Timezone.description: Automatically detect broker timezone offset via server time

InpNY_KZ_Enabled.description: Enable New York Kill Zone (07:00-10:00 UTC)

InpNYPM_KZ_Enabled.description: Enable New York PM session (13:00-16:00 UTC)

InpDraw_KillZones.description: Draw kill zone highlight boxes on chart background

InpDraw_SessionLevels.description: Draw midnight open, London open, NY open horizontal lines

InpFixed_Lot.description: Fixed lot size (used when Risk_Mode = FIXED_LOT)

InpRisk_Percent.description: Risk percent of account balance per trade

InpMax_Lot.description: Maximum allowed lot size regardless of calculation

InpSL_Pips.description: Fixed stop loss in pips (overridden if InpDynamic_SL = true)

InpDynamic_SL.description: If true, SL is placed beyond manipulation wick + buffer

InpSL_Buffer_Pips.description: Extra pips beyond wick for SL placement

InpTP2_RR.description: Take profit 2 as Risk:Reward ratio (e.g. 3.0 = 3R). 0 = disabled.

InpTP1_ClosePercent.description: Percent of position to close at TP1

InpBreakeven_After_TP1.description: Move SL to breakeven after TP1 is hit

InpMax_Spread_Pips.description: Skip trade if spread exceeds this value (in pips/points for XAUUSD)

InpMax_Slippage_Points.description: Maximum allowed slippage in points on order execution

InpMax_Daily_Trades.description: Maximum number of trades per day. 0 = unlimited.

InpMax_Daily_Loss_Percent.description: Stop trading for the day if daily drawdown exceeds this percent

InpScalper_Mode.description: Enable scalper mode — faster entries, tighter parameters

InpScalper_TP_Pips.description: Quick scalp TP in pips (used when scalper mode is active)

InpScalper_SL_Pips.description: Quick scalp SL in pips (used when scalper mode is active)

InpScalper_Min_Momentum_Pips.description: Minimum candle close momentum in pips to trigger entry

InpEntry_On_Close.description: If true, enter on candle close confirmation. If false, enter on signal candle open.

InpAllow_Multiple_Trades.description: Allow multiple concurrent open trades from this EA

InpShow_Dashboard.description: Show account and strategy dashboard on chart

InpShow_CandleLabels.description: Show ACC / MANIP / DIST labels on chart candles

InpShow_OB_Zones.description: Draw order block zones on chart

account_information_module.description: EA must retrieve and display real-time account metrics on the chart dashboard. All values must refresh on every tick.

lot_size_calculated.description: Show the calculated lot size for next trade based on current risk settings
lot_size_calculated.label: Next Lot

candlestick_pattern_analysis.description: EA must detect, classify, and annotate each of the following candlestick patterns directly on the chart. Labels should appear above or below the relevant candle. All analysis runs on InpLTF_Timeframe.

doji.label: DOJI
doji.significance: Indecision — watch for CRT manipulation next candle

bullish_engulfing.condition: Current bullish body fully engulfs prior bearish body
bullish_engulfing.label: BULL ENG
bullish_engulfing.significance: Strong bullish reversal signal. High weight in discount zone.

bearish_engulfing.condition: Current bearish body fully engulfs prior bullish body
bearish_engulfing.label: BEAR ENG
bearish_engulfing.significance: Strong bearish reversal signal. High weight in premium zone.

hammer.condition: Lower wick >= 2 * Body AND Body in top third of range AND bullish
hammer.label: HAMMER
hammer.significance: Bullish reversal. Extra weight if at CRT manipulation low.

shooting_star.condition: Upper wick >= 2 * Body AND Body in bottom third of range AND bearish
shooting_star.label: SHOOT*
shooting_star.significance: Bearish reversal. Extra weight if at CRT manipulation high.

pin_bar.condition: Wick > 2.5 * Body in any direction. ICT-style rejection candle.
pin_bar.label: PIN
pin_bar.significance: Core CRT manipulation rejection. Highest entry priority.

inside_bar.condition: High < Prior High AND Low > Prior Low
inside_bar.label: IB
inside_bar.significance: Accumulation / compression. Often precedes CRT manipulation.

morning_star.condition: 3-candle pattern: bearish + doji/small + bullish gap-up close
morning_star.label: MSTAR
morning_star.significance: Bullish reversal. Confirm with discount zone + LDN/NY kill zone.

evening_star.condition: 3-candle pattern: bullish + doji/small + bearish gap-down close
evening_star.label: ESTAR
evening_star.significance: Bearish reversal. Confirm with premium zone.

bullish_marubozu.condition: Minimal wicks, body > 85% of range, bullish close
bullish_marubozu.label: BULL MARU
bullish_marubozu.significance: Strong distribution candle. Confirms bullish CRT target direction.

bearish_marubozu.condition: Minimal wicks, body > 85% of range, bearish close
bearish_marubozu.label: BEAR MARU
bearish_marubozu.significance: Strong distribution candle. Confirms bearish CRT target direction.

tweezer_top.condition: Two consecutive candles with matching highs, second bearish
tweezer_top.label: TWZR-T
tweezer_top.significance: Double rejection at high. High-precision sell signal in premium.

tweezer_bottom.condition: Two consecutive candles with matching lows, second bullish
tweezer_bottom.label: TWZR-B
tweezer_bottom.significance: Double rejection at low. High-precision buy signal in discount.

entry_logic.description: Full entry decision tree. All conditions must be met before order is submitted.

required_conditions.name: Kill zone active
required_conditions.check: Current server time is within at least one enabled TBS kill zone

required_conditions.name: Daily loss limit
required_conditions.fail_action: Stop trading for the day — display alert on dashboard

required_conditions.name: HTF bias confirmed
required_conditions.check: HTF timeframe shows clear AMD structure with Accumulation phase identified. If InpBiasConfirmation = true.

required_conditions.name: Manipulation sweep detected on LTF
required_conditions.check: Wick penetration > InpManipulation_MinWickPips AND body closes inside previous range AND rejection candle confirmed
required_conditions.fail_action: Skip — reset and wait for next manipulation

required_conditions.name: Direction alignment
required_conditions.check: Sweep direction aligns with HTF bias: sweep of lows in HTF bullish context = buy; sweep of highs in HTF bearish context = sell
required_conditions.fail_action: Skip — counter-trend setups disabled unless InpCounterTrend = true

required_conditions.name: FVG or OB confluence (optional boost)
required_conditions.check: If price is entering a nearby FVG or Order Block, increase signal score by 1
required_conditions.fail_action: Does not block entry — used for signal scoring only

signal_scoring.description: Each condition adds to the signal score. Trade is taken only if score >= InpMin_Signal_Score.

TP1.target: InpTP1_RR x risk in pips, or 50% of AMD distribution range
TP1.action_after: Move SL to breakeven if InpBreakeven_After_TP1 = true

TP2.target: InpTP2_RR x risk in pips, or FVG fill level

stop_loss.fallback: InpSL_Pips fixed if dynamic calculation returns invalid value

end_of_session.description: Close all EA trades before end-of-day to avoid overnight exposure on XAUUSD

daily_loss_limit_hit.action: Close all EA trades and halt EA for the day

chart_visualization.description: All drawings must be created as chart objects using ObjectCreate() and must be cleaned up on EA removal (OnDeinit).

kill_zone_boxes.usage: Background shading for each kill zone time window per day

multi_timeframe_logic.description: EA uses three timeframe layers simultaneously. Data is fetched using CopyRates() or iBarShift per timeframe.

HTF.updates: On new bar only (OnCalculate rate_total change)

MTF.purpose: CRT pattern confirmation, FVG and OB identification

LTF.purpose: Precise entry timing, candle pattern detection, execution
LTF.updates: Every tick for signals, new bar for pattern recalculation

confluence_rules.htf_bullish_context: HTF price above AMD equilibrium AND BOS to upside on HTF
confluence_rules.htf_bearish_context: HTF price below AMD equilibrium AND BOS to downside on HTF
confluence_rules.mtf_confirmation: MTF shows matching FVG or OB in direction of HTF bias
confluence_rules.ltf_trigger: LTF shows manipulation sweep + rejection candle in kill zone

logging_and_diagnostics.description: EA must log all significant events with timestamps to the MT5 Experts log and optionally to a CSV file.
log_events: Trade opened — lot, SL, TP, spread at entry, slippage

xauusd_specific_notes.description: Gold-specific configuration considerations for the EA developer.
xauusd_specific_notes.pip_definition: XAUUSD: 1 pip = 0.10 price movement. 1 point = 0.01. Use Digits() and Point to normalize.
xauusd_specific_notes.typical_spread: 20–80 points during active sessions. Set InpMax_Spread_Pips = 30 points as default.
xauusd_specific_notes.volatility_notes: XAUUSD can move 150–300 pips/day. Use higher SL buffers vs forex pairs.
xauusd_specific_notes.news_filter_recommendation: Avoid trading during high-impact news (NFP, CPI, FOMC). Consider integrating a news filter via external calendar or pausing EA manually.
xauusd_specific_notes.margin_requirement_note: Check SYMBOL_MARGIN_INITIAL for required margin per lot before each trade
xauusd_specific_notes.suffix_note: Account for broker symbol suffixes: GOLD.i#, XAUUSD.m, XAUUSDi etc. Implement auto-detection via SymbolSelect and MarketInfo.
xauusd_specific_notes.session_peak_volatility: 07:00–10:00 UTC (NY Open) is the highest-volume window for XAUUSD. Prioritize NY kill zone.

code_structure_guidance.description: Recommended MQL5 file and class structure for maintainability.

files.CRT_TBS_Gold_Scalper.mq5: Main EA file — OnInit, OnDeinit, OnTick, OnChartEvent
files.Include/CRT_Analyzer.mqh: CRT pattern detection class — AMD phases, FVG, OB, swing detection
files.Include/TBS_Sessions.mqh: Kill zone management, timezone handling, session level drawing
files.Include/RiskManager.mqh: Lot calculation, SL/TP computation, daily limit tracking
files.Include/Dashboard.mqh: On-chart dashboard rendering and account info display
files.Include/PatternDetector.mqh: Candlestick pattern detection — all named patterns
files.Include/TradeExecutor.mqh: Order placement, modification, trailing stop logic

init_checklist: Validate symbol is XAUUSD or Gold variant using SymbolSelect
Auto-detect broker timezone offset by comparing TimeCurrent() vs TimeGMT()
Set chart timeframe to InpLTF_Timeframe automatically
Subscribe to chart events for dashboard interactivity
Run initial HTF and MTF analysis on startup
Draw all session reference levels for the current and previous day
Display dashboard with live account info

final_instructions_for_antigravity.priority_1: Implement every module described in this JSON. Do not omit the dashboard, candlestick annotations, multi-timeframe logic, or the TBS kill zone system.
final_instructions_for_antigravity.priority_2: All chart drawings must be object-based (ObjectCreate) and cleaned up in OnDeinit. No spaghetti drawing code.
final_instructions_for_antigravity.priority_3: The EA must be compilable in MetaEditor MT5 with zero errors and zero warnings.
final_instructions_for_antigravity.priority_4: Use CTrade class from <Trade/Trade.mqh> for order execution. Do not use legacy OrderSend.
final_instructions_for_antigravity.priority_5: Risk management must handle edge cases: zero balance, zero margin, symbol not found, market closed.
final_instructions_for_antigravity.priority_6: Make InpBrokerUTC_Offset auto-detectable — compare TimeCurrent() vs TimeGMT() on init.
final_instructions_for_antigravity.priority_7: The scalper mode (InpScalper_Mode=true) should use tighter TP/SL, M5 LTF, and only NY+London kill zones by default.
final_instructions_for_antigravity.priority_8: Comment every major function block with the strategy rationale, not just what the code does.
